notes:
to get this game running i did not, need to do that much. im giving it lurks be gold because.  its seems to be that if you have. the propritary drivers from, AMD installed. it lurks below will launch and is perfectly playable.  i found that without amds propritary driver installed.  the game would launch with sound. but all you get is a black window.     

once amds propritary drivers where installed.  for my system.  everything about the game works.  im ablel to change it from windowed mode to full screen with no issues.   sound works great.  if not set to high,  changing resalutions works flawlessly.  in general i did not have to really tweak anything.  it lurks below just worked out of the box with AMDS propritary driver installed
title: It Lurks Below

notes:
Starts with a black screen & sound has 100% CPU usage and never finishes loading.

Switching to steam on wine starts the game and loads the menu but still 100% CPU usage and is unplayable.

notes: Black screens on load. Can't get it to work any way tried.
title: It Lurks Below

notes: It just has a black screen. I'll try the recommended tweaks, if they work I will amend this report.
title: It Lurks Below

notes: only minor issue i have is.  it will launch with a black screen sometimes. found out i can just minumiz/go to desktop.  go back to the game. it will run perfectly with AMD propritary drivers. could not get it to work any other way.
title: It Lurks Below

notes: Add "PROTON_USE_D9VK=1 %command%" to launch options. Works great.
title: It Lurks Below

notes: It ran after setting the game to use Proton 4.11-2 and adding PROTON_USE_D9VK=1 %command% to the launch options. I had to use windowed mode for the game to start properly. In full screen mode you need to minimise then alt tab back to the game to see it. Proton 4.11-2, the launch options and windowed runs the game great
title: It Lurks Below
